title: World Folders
description: Organize your worlds into in-game folders!
body:
# World Folders

World Folders is a mod that lets you neatly sort your worlds into in-game folders!

## Description

To help make navigating through your worlds list easier, this mod lets you create folders and put mods into them. You can create folders with names and colors and put worlds into them through the Edit World screen. 

When not searching for a specific world, you will only see the list of folders and can click on them to see their contents. 

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o2ekSuCs/images/9fa498c23b490638b4f12ee999f96de302af033b.png)

These folders only exist in-game, your worlds are not actually moved into folders on the system level. This means you can add/remove the mod without any issues.
